creator: rometravelers
caption:
@iampcast made Rome look like the kind of city that ruins every other destination for you 🏛️✨Tag someone you’d spend endless days getting lost in Rome with! ❤️🍝

💡 Fun Fact: Rome is often called the “Eternal City” because ancient Romans believed it would stand forever.

💡 Curiosità: Roma è spesso chiamata la “Città Eterna” perché gli antichi Romani credevano che sarebbe durata per sempre.

📍Rome, Italy

transcription.text: I'm in a bad girl good mood, wearing my gold hoops Lining my lips right now in the rearview, baby Don't even play
